items.caption: A brown fertilizer bag with a green leaf logo and the word "fertilizer" printed on it. the bag is standing upright on a white background. in front of the bag, there is a dark pile of soil with small white specks, possibly seeds or small rocks, scattered on its surface. the soil appears to be freshly tilled, with a smooth texture. the overall style of the image is a flat, vector illustration with a simple color palette.
